pr_title: SDLC-80: Fix business-class window seat mapping
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix the business-class seat-type mapping so window-seat preferences select actual window seats.

## What changes
- Correct `_seat_type_for` in `backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py`
- Ensure business cabin maps:
  - A, D -> window
  - B, C -> aisle
- Add/adjust regression tests for business-class seat classification and preference assignment

## Why
Business-class passengers requesting a window seat were being assigned a centre/aisle-adjacent seat because the column mapping was inverted.

## Validation
- Focused unit tests for seat type mapping
- Preference-selection test for business-class window requests
- Sanity check that other cabin mappings remain unchanged
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
